positive: A minimalist abstract portrait of a roaring, stylized lion's head, rendered in solid black and vibrant teal silhouettes. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring geometric tribal patterns and sharp, clean lines that emanate from the mane and face. The style is modern vector art combined with Japanese Irezumi (tattoo) aesthetics. The background should be a solid, clean cream off-white to maximize contrast for printing. Highly detailed linework, suitable for single-color screen printing on t-shirts. High contrast, crisp edges, vector graphic feel, Pop Art influence, graphic novel quality, high resolution, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, grainy, messy, photo, realistic, copyrighted, celebrity, multiple subjects, extra limbs
